untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of specific candle pattern (3-day pattern) and bear market regime confirmation not directly available in indicator set. 'Rising volume trend in bear market' requires multi-bar analysis and market regime detection beyond simple indicator conditions. Exact target price at congestion zone marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Breakout occurs on day after candle ends, requiring forward-looking logic not supported by standard backtest engine conditions.
translation_notes: Translated available components: (1) volume above 20-period average approximates 'rising volume trend', (2) close below prior low approximates 'downward breakout', (3) vol_ratio_20 < 1.0 approximates 'below-average volume', (4) exit uses mean reversion logic since target price is AUTHOR_SILENT. Pattern-specific validation (3-day candle, bear market confirmation, exact congestion zone target) requires manual review or custom pattern detection logic.
